div1.entryFree:
Notwithstanding, prepos. in spite of: Gent. IV, 2, 12. Wiv. I, 4, 111. H5 V, 2, 240. H6B III, 2, 258. Tit. II, 4, 29. Placed after the noun: he hath not money for these Irish wars, his burthenous taxations n. R2 II, 1, 260. which n. thou shalt be no less esteemed, Tim. II, 2, 111.
== over and above, besides, abstractedly from: so your hand and heart . . . should, n. that your bond of duty, as 'twere in love's particular, be more to me, your friend, than any, H8 III, 2, 188.
